channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Everton scores stoppage-time equalizer against Liverpool in last Merseyside derby at Goodison Park
item.description: LIVERPOOL, England (AP) — The 120th and final Merseyside derby at Goodison Park delivered a stunning finish as James Tarkowski grabbed an equalizer for Everton in the eighth minute of stoppage time to secure a 2-2 draw with Liverpool in the Premier League on Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Monahan says bringing LIV players back into the fold is a top priority for golf
item.description: SAN DIEGO (AP) — PGA Tour Commissioner Jay Monahan said his meeting with President Donald Trump moved the tour “one step closer” to a deal with the Saudi-backers of rival LIV Golf. He said Wednesday reunification is the top priority.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FERGUSON, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Trump’s love for golf can be ‘very helpful’ in quest to reunite sport, Adam Scott says
item.description: PGA Tour player Adam Scott, a member of the tour's Player Advisory Board, said President Donald Trump's love for golf could be "very helpful" for an eventual deal with LIV.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: College football offensive lineman Ben Christman, 21, found dead in his apartment, school says
item.description: Ben Christmas, a college football offensive lineman who recently transferred to UNLV, was found dead in his off-campus apartment, the school said Wednesday. He was 21.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Trans athlete Sadie Schreiner not competing for RIT women's track team after Trump's executive order
item.description: Transgender track and field runner Sadie Schreiner is not competing in future women's track events for Rochester Institute of Technology amid a new NCAA policy.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Angels' Anthony Rendon out long term because of upcoming hip surgery
item.description: Angels third baseman Anthony Rendon will undergo hip surgery and be out for an extended period, his latest injury setback since joining Los Angeles.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Luka Doncic trade to Lakers couldn't be vetoed, NBA commish says
item.description: NBA Commissioner Adam Silver said that he could not have vetoed the blockbuster Luka Doncic trade based on merit during a recent appearance on Barstool Sports "Pardon My Take.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Lindsey Vonn says she 'would be proud to race with anyone' in team combined at the Olympics
item.description: SAALBACH-HINTERGLEMM, Austria (AP) — It’s not just downhill and super-G that Lindsey Vonn wants to compete in at the age of 41 at next year’s Milan-Cortina Olympics.
item.dc:creator: ANDREW DAMPF, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Suns' Kevin Durant becomes 8th player in NBA history to score 30,000 points in loss to the Grizzlies
item.description: Phoenix Suns superstar Kevin Durant became the eighth player in NBA history to score 30,000 points when he made a free throw in the third quarter of the team's loss on Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Denny Hamlin leads fast group of Toyotas in NASCAR's opening practice for the Daytona 500
item.description: Denny Hamlin led a trio of Toyota drivers — the manufacturer claimed five of the top six spots — in the opening practice for the Daytona 500.
item.dc:creator: Jenna Fryer, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Education Department rescinds Biden memo that threatened to upend college NIL payments
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — The U.S. Education Department is scrapping last-minute guidance issued by the Biden administration that threatened to upend colleges’ plans to pay athletes for their name, image and likeness by making those payments subject to federal Title IX rules.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Patrick Mahomes lost like a champion which can be harder to do than win like one
item.description: Patrick Mahomes put the blame on his shoulders and showed grace and dignity following the Super Bowl LIX defeat. He conducted himself like a champion.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Max Homa is trying to dig himself out of another hole
item.description: SAN DIEGO (AP) — On the list of U.S. Open final qualifying sites announced this week is Valencia Country Club in the Southern California city where Max Homa was raised. That might be an option for him, which would have seemed absurd a year ago.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FERGUSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Adames, Verlander and Dodger dominance: Recapping SF Giants’ 2024-25 offseason
item.description: Posey's first offseason as president of baseball operations headlined by additions of Adames, Verlander
item.dc:creator: Justice delos Santos, The Mercury News

item.title: NBA All-Star festivities feature Bay Area heroes beyond Warriors’ Curry
item.description: This week's NBA All-Star festivities include a handful of players with Bay Area ties beyond Steph Curry and his Warriors teammates.
item.dc:creator: Cam Inman, The Mercury News

item.title: Wrexham says one of its players hospitalized after road incident on way home from match
item.description: WREXHAM, Wales (AP) — Wrexham midfielder Elliot Lee was taken to the hospital after being involved in what the Welsh club described as a “road traffic incident” on the way home from a match, the team said Wednesday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Bellingham strikes late for Real Madrid in 3-2 win at Man City in Champions League 1st leg playoff
item.description: MANCHESTER, England (AP) — Real Madrid’s Galacticos just don’t know when they are beaten. Manchester City just keep on making the same mistakes. Jude Bellingham’s stoppage-time goal sealed a stunning comeback for Madrid and a 3-2 lead in its Champions League playoff against City.
item.dc:creator: JAMES ROBSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Girls Soccer: University City 4, Madison 0
item.description: SAN DIEGO (KUSI)-Girls soccer University City beat Madison 4-0 on senior night for the Warhawks. Sofia Christensen scored twice for the Centurions.
item.dc:creator: Nick James, Fox 5

item.title: UConn's Liam McNeeley draws inspiration for 38-point performance from Creighton fans heckling Hurley
item.description: OMAHA, Neb. (AP) — UConn freshman star Liam McNeeley hadn't played in front of a crowd as hostile as the one the Huskies faced in Omaha on Tuesday night. He found the environment inspiring.
item.dc:creator: ERIC OLSON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Madsen scores 28, but Utes lose at Cincinnati
item.description: CINCINNATI (ABC4 Sports) - Despite 28 points from Gabe Madsen against his former team, the Runnin' Utes fell at Cincinnati Tuesday night, 85-75. Madsen, who began his college career with the Bearcats, made eight three-pointers on 22 attempts, in matching a season high point total.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Boxing mogul in talks to stage fight at Alcatraz in San Francisco
item.description: (KRON) -- Five years ago, no one would have thought YouTuber Jake Paul would get in the ring last fall with Mike Tyson -- who is a boxing legend but has been retired for nearly 20 years.
item.dc:creator: Aaron Tolentino, KRON4

item.title: NBA All-Star 2025 tip-off party canceled due to weather
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (KRON) -- The official NBA All-Star 2025 tip-off party, which was set to take place Thursday at Thrive City has been canceled due to weather. The event was due to take place between 5 p.m. and 9 p.m.
item.dc:creator: Alex Baker, KRON4

item.title: Goaltending depth is a 'luxury' for the US that could come up big at the 2026 Milan Olympics
item.description: MONTREAL (AP) — When Jeremy Swayman played hockey for the Alaska Jr. Aces and at South Anchorage High School, he did not have a goaltending coach, and his home state did not have a goalie school.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN WHYNO, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Ex-49er Dana Stubblefield freed from prison after rape conviction overturned
item.description: A judge has granted the release of former San Francisco 49er Dana Stubblefield after his 2020 rape conviction was vacated by a California appeals court last December.
item.dc:creator: JAIMIE DING, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Dept of Education asks NCAA, high schools to erase records set by transgender athletes
item.description: WASHINGTON (AP) — The Department of Education took another step Tuesday in advancing the Trump administration's new transgender policy for sports by asking the NCAA and a key high-school sports organization to restore titles, awards and records it says have been “misappropriated by biological males
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Lakers blow past Jazz in Doncic debut, 132-113
item.description: LOS ANGELES (ABC4 Sports) - The Utah Jazz were no match for the Lakers in the much-anticipated debut of Luka Doncic. Doncic had 14 points, five rebounds and four assists in his Lakers debut as Los Angeles beat the Utah Jazz 132-113 on Monday night.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Member of Kendrick Lamar's Super Bowl halftime show won't face charges for flag protest
item.description: NEW ORLEANS (AP) — The cast member who displayed the Palestinian flag with the word “GAZA” in protest during Kendrick Lamar's Super Bowl halftime show will not face charges, New Orleans police said Monday.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Anthony Davis is out with groin strain for second game with Dallas Mavericks amid reports of longer absence
item.description: DALLAS (AP) — Anthony Davis has been ruled out of what would have been his second game with the Mavericks amid reports that a groin injury sustained in his Dallas debut could sideline him for multiple weeks.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KTLA 5

item.title: Eagles running back Saquon Barkley sets the NFL's season rushing record, including the playoffs
item.description: Saquon Barkley set an NFL single-season rushing record in the Super Bowl, held his young daughter as a torrent of confetti fluttered around them and flashed a smile as he held a Philadelphia newspaper with “CHAMPS!” stamped above his photo.
item.dc:creator: DAN GELSTON, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Did you know? The flag presented during the national anthem at Super Bowl LIX came from Utah
item.description: The flag presented during the performance of the national anthem at Super Bowl LIX was handmade by a Utah-based flag company.
item.dc:creator: Trevor Myers, ABC 4

item.title: Eagles beat Chiefs 40-22 in lopsided Super Bowl LIX
item.description: The Kansas City Chiefs wanted to make history with three back-to-back-to-back championships, but Super Bowl LIX was dominated by the Philadelphia Eagles, who won the game 40-22.
item.dc:creator: Addy Bink, Fox 5

item.title: The Latest: Eagles spoil Chiefs' three-peat bid, win Super Bowl 40-22
item.description: Super Bowl 59 kicks off in just a few hours, when the Kansas City Chiefs will face a familiar foe, the Philadelphia Eagles, hoping to win the Lombardi Trophy for a record third year in a row.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WFLA, NBC

item.title: San Diego family shows off their Chiefs pride ahead of Super Bowl
item.description: Thousands of miles from Kansas City, Chiefs fans in San Diego are rallying together to show their unwavering support ahead of the Super Bowl, proving distance can't dampen their passion.
item.dc:creator: Jennifer Franco, Fox 5

item.title: He's back, baby! ESPN's Dick Vitale makes return to commentating following 4th bout with cancer
item.description: ESPN’s Dick Vitale received a standing ovation Saturday night at Clemson’s Littlejohn Coliseum in his first game back as a commentator since recovering from his fourth bout with cancer.
item.dc:creator: STEVE REED, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: LeBron James will sit out the Lakers' game against Indiana to rest his sore left ankle
item.description: LeBron James is sitting out the Los Angeles Lakers ' game against Indiana on Saturday to rest his sore left ankle.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Blackhawks visit the Blues after Donato's 2-goal performance
item.description: Chicago Blackhawks (17-31-6, in the Central Division) vs. St. Louis Blues (24-26-5, in the Central Division) St. Louis; Saturday, 7 p.m. EST BETMGM SPORTSBOOK LINE: Blues -250, Blackhawks +203; over/under is 5.5 BOTTOM LINE: The Chicago Blackhawks visit the St.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Gatorade colors, on-field proposals and other bets before Super Bowl
item.description: Known as prop bets, the annual list of side wagers includes game-related stats as well as creative propositions.
item.dc:creator: Jeremy Tanner, NewsNation
